claimText: LMU IfKW student guidance says AI may be used in assessments only with explicit teacher permission; if no explicit permission is given, students must assume AI use is not allowed.
normalizedValue: Assessment AI use requires explicit teacher permission in the IfKW guidance

citation.citationTitle: The use of AI by students
